description: Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children. What's more, every month, the school awards students points with a cash value of 100,000 yen, and the classes employ a laissez-faire policy in which talking...

episodes.title: S1E1 - What is evil? Whatever springs from weakness.

_meta.episode_title: What is evil? Whatever springs from weakness.

episodes.title: S1E2 - It takes a great talent and skill to conceal one's talent and skill.

_meta.episode_title: It takes a great talent and skill to conceal one's talent and skill.

episodes.title: S1E3 - Man is an animal that makes bargains: no other animal does this – no dog exchanges bones with another.

_meta.episode_title: Man is an animal that makes bargains: no other animal does this – no dog exchanges bones with another.

episodes.title: S1E4 - We should not be upset that others hide the truth from us, when we hide it so often from ourselves.

_meta.episode_title: We should not be upset that others hide the truth from us, when we hide it so often from ourselves.

episodes.title: S1E6 - There are two kinds of lies; one concerns an accomplished fact, the other concerns a future duty.

_meta.episode_title: There are two kinds of lies; one concerns an accomplished fact, the other concerns a future duty.

episodes.title: S1E7 - Nothing is as dangerous as an ignorant friend; a wise enemy is to be preferred

_meta.episode_title: Nothing is as dangerous as an ignorant friend; a wise enemy is to be preferred

episodes.title: S1E8 - Abandon all hope, ye who enter here.

_meta.episode_title: Abandon all hope, ye who enter here.

episodes.title: S1E9 - Man is condemned to be free.

_meta.episode_title: Man is condemned to be free.

episodes.title: S1E10 - Every man has in himself the most dangerous traitor of all

_meta.episode_title: Every man has in himself the most dangerous traitor of all

episodes.title: S1E11 - What people commonly call fate is mostly their own stupidity.

_meta.episode_title: What people commonly call fate is mostly their own stupidity.

episodes.title: S1E12 - Genius lives only one story above madness.

_meta.episode_title: Genius lives only one story above madness.
